column1: # Igbo (ibo) book names and abbreviations for biblelib
# Conventions: Akwụkwọ Nsọ (Igbo Union Bible), Bible Society of Nigeria (BSN)
# OT uses descriptive Igbo names where established; transliterations elsewhere
# Abbreviations: derived from Igbo name; no published standard exists
# Deuterocanonical and extended canon: transliterated (BSN is Protestant only)
# Note: Igbo tonal orthography (ọ, ị, ụ) preserved; native-speaker review recommended
